x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
Encodes or decodes base64 ascii texts.
Actions:
**************
common actions
**************
--help|-help|help|-h|/?                  : Displays this help message
-v|version                               : Displays the current version of the executable
update check                             : Check for updates of this tool
update install                           : Install the latest update of this tool
**************
decode actions
**************
decode --jwt -[-file|f] <input-file>     : Decodes a jwt ascii text from the given ascii file
decode --jwt <input>                     : Decodes a jwt ascii text from stdin
decode -[-file|f] <input-file>           : Decodes a base64 ascii text from the given ascii file
decode -[-url|u] -[-file|f] <input-file> : Decodes a base64 ascii text from the given ascii file with respecting url encoding
decode -[-url|u] <input>                 : Decodes a base64 ascii text from stdin with respecting url encoding
decode <input>                           : Decodes a base64 ascii text from stdin
**************
encode actions
**************
encode -[-file|f] <input-file>           : Encodes a base64 ascii text from the given ascii file
encode -[-url|u] -[-file|f] <input-file> : Encodes a base64 ascii text from the given ascii file with respecting url encoding
encode -[-url|u] <input>                 : Encodes a base64 ascii text from stdin with respecting url encoding
encode <input>                           : Encodes a base64 ascii text from stdin

options.name: -v
options.description: : Displays the current version of the executable
